title: Rule model and config loader (.jit/rules.toml)
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 3, 7.2, 8.1.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] Rule = selector + assertion + severity parsed from .jit/rules.toml.
- [hard] Selector matrix (type, label, state, has_doc_type) AND-combinable; matching returns the union of applicable rules.
- [hard] Schemas load inline or from .jit/schemas/*.json; a rule is shorthand XOR raw-schema and the loader REJECTS mixing shorthand and raw schema in one rule.
- [hard] severity off/warn/error and per-rule enforce (default false) are parsed.
